name: Portgas.D.Ace (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play] If you have 2 or more rested Characters, rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP09 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.
